original_description: Looks at your UI and figures out what's wrong, then brings in layout, interaction, copy, or engineer as needed.
best_description: Looks at your UI and figures out what's wrong, then brings in layout, interaction, copy, or engineer as needed.
final_description: Critique components or pages for design craft. Use when you ask to: review your UI, get feedback before shipping, run a polish pass, figure out what's off. Systematic audit of layout, interaction, and copy. Skip for: building features, implementing CSS, or design advice — this polishes existing work.

history.description: Looks at your UI and figures out what's wrong, then brings in layout, interaction, copy, or engineer as needed.

train_results.query: the cards on the home dashboard feel inconsistent with each other but I can't tell why — diagnose
hey can you review my landing page hero, the design feels a bit AI-generated and I want craft feedback
tu peux check le composant que j'ai fait dans NumberFlowing.tsx pour voir si c'est polished
I just merged the new modal component, give me a craft review before it goes to staging
im about to ship the new pricing page tomorrow, can you do a polish pass on /pricing.tsx and tell me whats off

write a CSS animation for the logo to fade in on page load with a spring curve
convert the Figma file at https://figma.com/file/xyz to a React component using shadcn
build me a new dashboard with cards showing weekly active users and revenue trends
translate the labels in my fr.json file to spanish
what's a good font pairing for an editorial blog with a serif body?

history.description: Use when existing UI feels off but you can't pinpoint why. Reviews pages and components for craft issues: inconsistent layout, flat interactions, awkward copy, AI-generated aesthetics. For polish passes, design audits, pre-ship reviews. Covers layout, interaction, copy, code handoff. NOT for: building new UI, CSS implementation, design advice.
